title: Charlie Got Molested

jokes.text: Charlie's panicked response to being asked about Coach Murray: 'What? No. Yes, he did. We were in the same class. No. Yeah. Well, no, I didn't like it though.'
jokes.setup: Simple question about whether Murray taught them
jokes.punchline: Charlie's contradictory, rambling non-answer reveals something's off
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing Charlie's inability to lie convincingly, building tension through contradiction

jokes.text: Charlie suddenly runs away: 'I gotta go!'
jokes.setup: Charlie's already suspicious behavior
jokes.punchline: Abrupt escape when pressed for details
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective physical comedy through Charlie's panic

jokes.text: Mac's confident declaration: 'Holy shit. Charlie got molested.'
jokes.setup: Charlie's bizarre behavior
jokes.punchline: Mac jumps to the most extreme conclusion with complete certainty
jokes.explanation: Excellent character moment showing Mac's tendency to make wild assumptions, delivered with perfect confidence

jokes.text: Dennis suggesting they tell everyone Charlie got blown by a gym teacher and throw him a surprise party to celebrate
jokes.setup: Discussion of having an intervention for Charlie
jokes.punchline: Dennis suggests celebrating the molestation with a party
jokes.explanation: Perfect dark comedy subversion - taking something serious and making it grotesquely inappropriate

jokes.text: Mac's obsession with whether Murray 'blew these guys' and detailed description of the McPoyle twins
jokes.setup: Discussion of what type of abuse occurred
jokes.punchline: Mac fixates on oral sex specifics and describes the twins as 'unwiped assholes'
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable humor through Mac's inappropriate focus and vivid gross-out descriptions

jokes.text: Well, if Murray is, like, fondling or touching them, whatever... I get it, all right? But if he's dishing out blow jobs, come on.
jokes.setup: Mac's continued fixation on the specifics of abuse
jokes.punchline: Mac treating some forms of abuse as more acceptable than others
jokes.explanation: Darkly funny logic showing Mac's completely inappropriate value judgments

jokes.text: Mac's realization and outrage: 'then why didn't I get blown?'
jokes.setup: Mac realizes both McPoyles and Charlie allegedly got molested
jokes.punchline: Mac is offended he wasn't chosen for abuse
jokes.explanation: Brilliant character comedy - Mac's narcissism makes him feel left out of sexual abuse. Perfect economy and shock value.

jokes.text: Dee and Dennis's horrified reactions: 'You're goin' to hell, dude. Seriously.'
jokes.setup: Mac's outrageous statement about wanting to be molested
jokes.punchline: Even these terrible people are shocked by Mac
jokes.explanation: Good straight-man reaction that emphasizes how awful Mac's statement was

jokes.text: I'm not gonna walk in front of you! Go. / Just come in. / No, you go first, and I will follow you.
jokes.setup: Simple entrance into the McPoyle house
jokes.punchline: Bizarre power struggle over who enters first
jokes.explanation: Establishes McPoyle weirdness but relatively minor comedic moment

jokes.text: Dee calling Dennis out for using big words: 'Why are you throwing around big words?' / 'You failed all your classes'
jokes.setup: Dennis trying to sound professional with 'caregiver'
jokes.punchline: Dee points out his academic failures
jokes.explanation: Standard sibling bickering that reveals character flaws

jokes.text: Dennis's math logic: 'three-quarters of a major is bigger than a whole minor'
jokes.setup: Academic credentials argument
jokes.punchline: Dennis's nonsensical mathematical reasoning
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing Dennis's delusional confidence in flawed logic

jokes.text: Liam McPoyle's slip about showering: 'We just stepped out of the shower' then claiming he said 'he'
jokes.setup: Explanation of where his brother is
jokes.punchline: Accidentally reveals they shower together then lies about it
jokes.explanation: Perfect McPoyle weirdness - inappropriate behavior casually revealed then poorly covered up

jokes.text: McPoyles explaining their plan: 'he's a dick, and we hated him. This is our chance for revenge. You want in?'
jokes.setup: Discussion of going to police about Murray
jokes.punchline: Casually admitting it's false but they want revenge
jokes.explanation: Dark humor through casual admission of false accusations for petty revenge

jokes.text: Ryan McPoyle's business plan: 'there's the classic route of priest molestation... but we thought we'd mix it up a bit'
jokes.setup: Discussion of their lawsuit plans
jokes.punchline: Treating sexual abuse like a business opportunity with market analysis
jokes.explanation: Brilliant dark comedy treating serious trauma like market research

jokes.text: McPoyles' prison threat: 'prison can be a bad place... for someone like you, Charlie. A very bad place.'
jokes.setup: Threatening Charlie with conspiracy charges
jokes.punchline: Ominous implication about what would happen to Charlie in prison
jokes.explanation: Menacing but somewhat clichéd prison threat

jokes.text: Dee's confession about Dr. Gainer: 'I had sex with him 'cause I wanted to... He was a hot older man'
jokes.setup: Argument about Dr. Gainer being a molester
jokes.punchline: Dee casually admits to sleeping with him
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable revelation delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: You have no room to talk. All the girls you've molested. Whoa, whoa. Don't start throwing that word around like it's meaningless, okay? This is serious.
jokes.setup: Dee accusing Mac of being a molester
jokes.punchline: Mac getting offended about misuse of the word while being guilty himself
jokes.explanation: Great irony - Mac being offended about word usage while being accused of the actual crime

jokes.text: Molester.
jokes.setup: Mac's serious lecture about not throwing around the word 'molester'
jokes.punchline: Dee immediately doing exactly what he said not to do
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and economy - single word completely undermines Mac's authority

jokes.text: Coach Murray's defense: 'I got so much ass back in those days. What the hell did I need that kind of shit for?'
jokes.setup: Murray denying molestation charges
jokes.punchline: His defense is that he was getting plenty of consensual sex
jokes.explanation: Uncomfortable defense strategy from sleazy gym teacher

jokes.text: You know when you get real tight, like, right up in here in this area here? You know what I mean? Not here. Like right in here. What are you doing?
jokes.setup: Mac trying to get the coach to touch his muscles
jokes.punchline: Increasingly inappropriate physical positioning and the coach's confused reaction
jokes.explanation: Cringe comedy from Mac's desperate attempts to get inappropriate attention

jokes.text: So, the assailant doesn't go after the one he finds most attractive... this guy. He goes after the weakest he can find.
jokes.setup: Mac explaining pedophile psychology he researched
jokes.punchline: Mac pointing to himself as the 'most attractive' option
jokes.explanation: Perfect Mac narcissism - researching abuse psychology only to confirm his own attractiveness

jokes.text: Mac explaining Charlie was too psychotic to molest: 'his face would turn purple and he'd start biting things'
jokes.setup: Mac explaining why Charlie wouldn't be targeted
jokes.punchline: Charlie was too scary and violent as a child
jokes.explanation: Perfect Charlie characterization - even as a child he was unhinged

jokes.text: Mac on the McPoyles: 'They were prime real estate. I'm sure he went to town on them.'
jokes.setup: Explaining who would be targeted for abuse
jokes.punchline: Mac treats child abuse like a real estate transaction
jokes.explanation: Dark humor through inappropriate business metaphors

jokes.text: You know how I already know that? 'Cause you keep saying it. I keep saying it because... it is. I'm sorry you're wrong about stuff all the time. I'm sorry that you're sorry all the time.
jokes.setup: Dennis and Dee arguing about their approach to Charlie
jokes.punchline: Dennis's nonsensical 'sorry' wordplay that makes no sense
jokes.explanation: Weak wordplay that shows Dennis trying to sound clever but failing

jokes.text: Uncle Jack at the intervention echoing the McPoyles: 'Prison can be a bad place for a guy like that. Very bad place.'
jokes.setup: Family intervention for Charlie
jokes.punchline: Uncle Jack uses the exact same ominous phrasing as the McPoyles
jokes.explanation: Callback that makes Uncle Jack sound menacing, suggesting he knows more about prison than he should

jokes.text: The anatomically correct doll reveal and family's reactions
jokes.setup: Standard intervention with demonstration doll
jokes.punchline: Doll is anatomically correct, creating awkward family moment
jokes.explanation: Standard uncomfortable visual gag with anatomical doll

jokes.text: Okay, Charlie, show us on the doll. Show you what? Where he touched you.
jokes.setup: Intervention participants trying to help Charlie process his trauma
jokes.punchline: Classic therapy technique applied inappropriately to adult situation
jokes.explanation: Classic cringe comedy from inappropriate application of child therapy techniques

jokes.text: Family member suggesting turning the doll over and everyone's uncomfortable agreement
jokes.setup: Doll demonstration getting awkward
jokes.punchline: Making it even more inappropriate by focusing on the back
jokes.explanation: Escalation of awkwardness but fairly predictable

jokes.text: Dee's revelation: 'my sister screamed and told everyone that I touched her vagina'
jokes.setup: Discussing how well the intervention went
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of extremely inappropriate family moment
jokes.explanation: Shocking casual reveal of inappropriate family dynamics

jokes.text: I gotta say, my favorite part was at the end there when we were all hugging... and my sister screamed and told everyone that I touched her vagina.
jokes.setup: McPoyle commenting on how well the intervention went
jokes.punchline: Casual mention of incest accusation during family hug
jokes.explanation: Perfectly shocking McPoyle moment - incest revelation delivered as casual observation

jokes.text: Sodomy.
jokes.setup: Police asking what Charlie wants to report
jokes.punchline: Charlie's blunt, clinical response to what he's reporting
jokes.explanation: Perfect timing and word choice - formal legal term delivered matter-of-factly

jokes.text: McPoyles' math: 'Split it 50-50... How 'bout Charlie?... We could always split it 50-50-50.'
jokes.setup: Discussing how to split lawsuit money
jokes.punchline: Suggesting splitting money 50-50-50, which is 150%
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing McPoyles' poor math skills

jokes.text: Charlie's betrayal: 'Great. I just ratted you out.'
jokes.setup: McPoyles expecting Charlie to file false report
jokes.punchline: Charlie casually reveals he turned them in instead
jokes.explanation: Good twist reveal delivered with Charlie's characteristic bluntness

jokes.text: Great. I just ratted you out. / Can I see you two boys for a minute, please?
jokes.setup: Charlie supposedly filing his own report
jokes.punchline: Immediate consequences for the McPoyles
jokes.explanation: Satisfying plot resolution but straightforward comedic payoff

jokes.text: Dennis claiming victory: 'three-quarters of a major... not so bad after all'
jokes.setup: Successful resolution of situation
jokes.punchline: Dennis brings back his earlier nonsensical math
jokes.explanation: Callback to earlier absurd logic, showing Dennis's consistency in delusion

jokes.text: Charlie's dark conclusion: 'everybody thinks that I've been molested. So, in a way, my life is ruined.'
jokes.setup: Explaining the outcome of the situation
jokes.punchline: Charlie realizes the permanent damage to his reputation
jokes.explanation: Dark comedy through Charlie's matter-of-fact acceptance of his ruined reputation

jokes.text: Murray's final assessment: 'That little prick's goin' to hell.'
jokes.setup: Mac's awkward attempt to get validation from Murray
jokes.punchline: Murray's harsh judgment of Mac
jokes.explanation: Solid ending beat showing even the sleazy gym teacher thinks Mac is awful

tmdb_overview: Charlie and Mac's old high school gym teacher is accused of molestation.
